content.title: Bitcoin Depot ATM Operator Says $3.6 Million in BTC Stolen in Corporate Hack
content.summary: The Bitcoin ATM operator disclosed a hack two weeks after attackers gained control of settlement account credentials and stole BTC.

content.title: Researchers Propose New Way to Manage Financial Risk When AI Agents Fumble Trades
content.summary: A newly proposed agentic settlement standard would hold fees in escrow and bring underwriters into AI agent transactions.

content.title: Bitcoin Miner Cango Sells $143 Million in BTC, Slashes Production Costs
content.summary: NYSE-listed miner Cango reduced costs by 19% by shutting down inefficient equipment, and sold Bitcoin to pay down debt.

content.title: Meta Launches Muse Spark, Its Most Capable AI Yet—But Gemini 3.1 Pro Still Leads the Pack
content.summary: Meta's first model from its Superintelligence team is natively multimodal, built for health reasoning, and genuinely competitive—but it doesn't top every leaderboard.

content.title: Treasury Outlines How Stablecoin Rules Will Fight Illicit Finance Under GENIUS Act
content.summary: The proposed rule prohibits people with criminal backgrounds from serving as the head of stablecoin issuers’ compliance programs.

content.title: Anthropic's Mythos Safety Report Shows It Can No Longer Fully Measure What It Built
content.summary: Anthropic’s Claude Mythos is powerful, but Its own safety report reveals a deeper crisis that's gone largely unnoticed.

content.title: Stablecoin Trading Volume Could Skyrocket to $1.5 Quadrillion by 2035: Chainalysis
content.summary: Generational wealth transfer and point-of-sale adoption could drive stablecoin volumes to eclipse traditional payment rails, says Chainalysis.

content.title: Bitcoin Pioneer Adam Back, Bernstein Say Quantum Threat to BTC Isn’t Existential
content.summary: Anxieties over the quantum threat to Bitcoin have been growing, but Bernstein backs Back in saying there’s no cause for alarm.

content.title: OpenAI Publishes Child Safety Blueprint to Address AI-Enabled Exploitation
content.summary: OpenAI's new policy blueprint outlines steps the industry can take to combat AI-enabled child sexual exploitation.

content.title: Hyperliquid Traders Face Widespread Liquidations as Oil Prices Collapse
content.summary: Brent crude oil prices were on track for their biggest daily decline since the start of the COVID-19 pandemic in early 2020.
